name: FreshBooks
description: Monitor FreshBooks accounting platform for financial data access and client management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to FreshBooks at https://my.freshbooks.com
2. Go to Settings → Developer Portal
3. Create an app and generate an OAuth access token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth access token from FreshBooks Developer Portal

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews FreshBooks account members with access to financial data

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies FreshBooks financial data is properly access-controlled
